data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestHall/text.FallarborTown_ContestHall_Text_DoAllRigh: We do all right in the preliminary round,\nbut we can never win the appeals...\pMaybe it means I have to watch what\nother contestants are doing...
data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestHall/text.FallarborTown_ContestHall_Text_MonAllThe: See!\nMy POKéMON won all these RIBBONS!\pHave your POKéMON earned any RIBBONS?\nYou can check them on your POKéNAV.
data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestHall/text.FallarborTown_ContestHall_Text_CantWinEv: I can't beat GYM LEADERS...\pI can't win any CONTESTS...\pI've been here, there, and everywhere,\nand it's all for naught...
